Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}Fuuka's skills support the party not only during combat, but also during exploration.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}She learns unique utility skills such as {f 0 1 35}Jamming{f 0 1 27}, which renders you undetectable to foes.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 26}Press {f 1 3 109} during exploration to activate Fuuka's abilities. Like your other teammates' skills, this costs SP, so use items to recover if she's running low.[n]{f 1 1}
